identity.name: KEEN
core_principles: Liquid Glass: Surfaces feel like milled crystal, not plastic.
Warmth over sterility: Use organic beige backgrounds (#F8F7F2) instead of clinical white.
Typography as Texture: Bold, massive, black typography creates structure where lines usually would.
Fluid Motion: Everything arrives with a liquid, spring-based physics (no linear eases).
Content is King: 60% whitespace, 40% content. No clutter.

headings.usage: Use for all H1-H3. H1 must be at least text-6xl md:text-8xl.

body.usage: High readability for course content and dashboard data.

mono.usage: Use sparingly for 'Course Code', 'Pricing', or 'AI Technical Terms'.

ui_surfaces.liquid_glass_card: bg-white/60 backdrop-blur-2xl backdrop-saturate-150 border border-white/40 shadow-[0_8px_30px_rgb(0,0,0,0.04)] rounded-3xl
ui_surfaces.glass_button: bg-black/90 text-white hover:bg-black hover:scale-105 transition-all duration-300 shadow-lg hover:shadow-xl rounded-full px-8 py-4 backdrop-blur-md

marketing.hero: Full height (min-h-[90vh]), text-center or asymmetric split. Must use 3D Liquid Element.
marketing.bento_grid: Use for 'Why KEEN' and 'Features'. Mix 1x1, 2x1, and 2x2 cells.

dashboard.content: Dense but airy. Use 'Solid Card' style for data to ensure readability.

buttons.primary: rounded-full bg-primary text-primary-foreground shadow-lg hover:shadow-xl hover:-translate-y-0.5 transition-all duration-300 font-medium px-8
buttons.secondary: rounded-full bg-white/50 border border-black/10 hover:bg-white hover:border-black/20 transition-all duration-300 backdrop-blur-md

inputs.style: bg-white/50 border-black/10 focus:border-black/30 focus:ring-0 rounded-xl h-12 backdrop-blur-sm transition-all

cards.course_card: group relative overflow-hidden rounded-3xl bg-white/40 border border-white/60 backdrop-blur-md transition-all hover:bg-white/60 hover:shadow-2xl hover:shadow-black/5
cards.pricing_card: relative rounded-[2rem] border border-black/5 bg-white/30 backdrop-blur-xl p-8 transition-all hover:-translate-y-2

navigation.navbar: fixed top-6 left-1/2 -translate-x-1/2 w-[90%] md:w-auto md:min-w-[400px] h-14 rounded-full bg-white/70 backdrop-blur-2xl border border-white/50 shadow-sm z-50 flex items-center justify-center px-2

3d_library.name: react-three-fiber
3d_library.usage: Use MeshTransmissionMaterial for the 'Liquid Glass' hero element.

images.style: Minimalist, high-key photography, abstract technological forms, warm lighting.

universal_guidelines: NEVER use default Tailwind blue colors. Stick to the Warm Beige + Black palette.
Glass effects MUST use 'backdrop-saturate-150' to avoid looking washed out.
Spacing is luxury. Use 'gap-8' or 'gap-12' for layout grids.
Do not use generic 'Inter' for headings. Use 'Plus Jakarta Sans'.
All interactive elements must have a 'data-testid' for testing.
For the Hero section, implement the R3F Liquid Glass donut/blob if possible, otherwise use a high-quality glass render image.
Ensure 'text-balance' is used on all headlines for better typography.
instructions_to_main_agent: 1. Install 'framer-motion', '@react-three/fiber', '@react-three/drei', 'lucide-react', 'clsx', 'tailwind-merge'. 2. Update 'tailwind.config.js' to include the new colors and font families. 3. Create a 'LiquidGlass' generic component that wraps content in the glass style defined in 'ui_surfaces'. 4. Build the Home page first with the 3D Hero. 5. Build the Course Catalog with the Bento Grid.
